languages.text: "Присылайте грузовые суда раз в цикл — мы добудем из котлов столько прометия, сколько сможем, до тех пор, пока не сгинет этот мир или не сгинем мы сами".

traits.locale_text: "Присылайте грузовые суда раз в цикл — мы добудем из котлов столько прометия, сколько сможем, до тех пор, пока не сгинет этот мир или не сгинем мы сами".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Send your cargo ships once every cycle — we will extract as much promethium from the vats as humanly possible, until the world perishes or we do."
languages.original_text: "Присылайте грузовые суда раз в цикл — мы добудем из котлов столько прометия, сколько сможем, до тех пор, пока не сгинет этот мир или не сгинем мы сами".

traits.locale_text: "Send your cargo ships once every cycle — we will extract as much promethium from the vats as humanly possible, until the world perishes or we do."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "Send your cargo ships once every cycle — we will extract as much promethium from the vats as humanly possible, until the world perishes or we do."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "Send your cargo ships once every cycle — we will extract as much promethium from the vats as humanly possible, until the world perishes or we do."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Schicken Sie Ihre Frachtschiffe einmal pro Zyklus — wir werden so viel Promethium aus den Fässern extrahieren wie möglich, bis die Welt untergeht oder wir es tun."
languages.original_text: "Send your cargo ships once every cycle — we will extract as much promethium from the vats as humanly possible, until the world perishes or we do."

languages.text: "Envoyez vos cargos une fois par cycle — nous extrairons autant de prométhium des cuves qu'il est humainement possible de le faire, jusqu'à ce que le monde périsse ou que nous le fassions.
languages.original_text: "Send your cargo ships once every cycle — we will extract as much promethium from the vats as humanly possible, until the world perishes or we do."

languages.text: "每个周期派出一次货船，我们将尽可能多地从大桶中提取钷元素，直到世界毁灭或我们毁灭"。
languages.original_text: "Send your cargo ships once every cycle — we will extract as much promethium from the vats as humanly possible, until the world perishes or we do."

languages.text: "Envíen sus naves de carga una vez cada ciclo — extraeremos tanto prometio de las cubas como sea humanamente posible, hasta que el mundo perezca o lo hagamos nosotros".
languages.original_text: "Send your cargo ships once every cycle — we will extract as much promethium from the vats as humanly possible, until the world perishes or we do."

languages.text: 「1サイクルに1回、貨物船を送れ。世界が滅びるか、われわれが滅びるまで、人力で可能な限り、桶からプロメチウムを抽出する」。
languages.original_text: "Send your cargo ships once every cycle — we will extract as much promethium from the vats as humanly possible, until the world perishes or we do."

languages.text: "Kargo gemilerinizi her döngüde bir kez gönderin — dünya yok olana ya da biz yok olana kadar fıçılardan insani olarak mümkün olduğunca çok prometyum çıkaracağız."
languages.original_text: "Send your cargo ships once every cycle — we will extract as much promethium from the vats as humanly possible, until the world perishes or we do."
